selected_options.decision: Do not move the existing v0.6.2 GitHub Release or tag; use package-only version 0.6.2.post1 for registry publication.
selected_options.execution: public main push performed after later owner approval; v0.6.2 tag and GitHub Release were not moved
TestPyPI workflow_dispatch from ctxgov/ctxgov main completed successfully and clean TestPyPI install smoke passed
manual-only GitHub Actions workflow published to TestPyPI through trusted publishing; official PyPI remains blocked

selected_options.decision: Use package-first announcement after package verification.
selected_options.execution: prepared blocked GitHub Release, announcement, and correction drafts; no release or outreach performed

trusted_publishing_constraints.reason: No automatic upload should happen on push, release, or tag.

trusted_publishing_constraints.constraint: TestPyPI and PyPI run as separate environment-gated jobs.
trusted_publishing_constraints.reason: Registry uploads are distinct external state changes and should be auditable separately.

trusted_publishing_constraints.constraint: PyPI job is tag-gated to refs/tags/v*.
trusted_publishing_constraints.reason: Official PyPI release should not run from an arbitrary branch ref.

trusted_publishing_constraints.constraint: Maintainer outreach is blocked for v0.6.2.
trusted_publishing_constraints.reason: The release theme is local Context Health Doctor, not downstream project evaluation, endorsement, or compatibility.

remaining_required_before_pypi: Wait for PyPI ctxgov organization approval, or record a separate decision to publish under an individual account.
Review TestPyPI receipt and install smoke.
Configure PyPI pending publisher for project ctxgov, owner ctxgov, repository ctxgov, workflow publish-python.yml, environment pypi.
Create and push a v0.6.2.post1 package tag after TestPyPI succeeds.
Run the workflow manually from a v0.6.2.post1 tag ref with registry=pypi.
Verify PyPI install in a clean environment.
Only then publish GitHub Release and approve package-first announcement.

rollback.source_rollback: Revert the public main commits that added package metadata, workflow, receipts, and ctxgov package identity if the package lane is abandoned.
